task: put the pink block on top of the drawer
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white drawer is open, with a pink block visible inside. A white tray is on the floor. The drawer is a rigid container with a front face; the pink block is a small, solid object. STRATEGY - First, reach into the drawer to grasp the pink block. Then, transport it to the white tray. Finally, place the block on the tray. Failure modes include missing the block in the drawer or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer front to access the block; Step 2 grasp the pink block (as a small solid object); Step 3 transport to the tray; Step 4 place on the tray.
Goal: on(pink_block, white_tray)
Scene: pink_block, white_drawer, white_tray
Step 1: reach(white_drawer)
  affordance_region: the front face of the white drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_drawer) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the pink block inside the white drawer
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white tray
  spatial: above(pink_block, white_tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: above(pink_block, white_tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white tray
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, white_tray) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, white_tray) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the front face of the white drawer
the pink block inside the white drawer
an empty area on the white tray
an empty area on the white tray
